subject: Stonjourner, a large quadrupedal rock-type Pokémon with a flat stone slab body and four thick pillar-like legs
description: Stonjourner stands prominently in a rocky outdoor landscape, its massive body composed of a flat horizontal stone slab supported by four thick columnar legs. Chunks of rock and debris appear to float or have been recently displaced around it, suggesting movement or impact. The color palette is dominated by warm browns, tans, and grays. The creature's flat top surface and sturdy pillared legs evoke a standing stone monument or ancient henge. The composition positions the Pokémon in mid-ground against an open sky with scattered stone fragments.
foreground: Stonjourner standing on rocky terrain with floating stone debris
background: Open sky with rocky landscape, warm tones
